chinablocks2.title_zh: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能初创公司 Manus
chinablocks2.summary_zh: 中国周一表示，已决定阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购 Manus，这是一家源自中国的新加坡人工智能初创公司。

europeanmark.title_zh: 据报道伊朗提出和平提议，欧洲市场动摇
europeanmark.summary_zh: 由于投资者密切关注陷入僵局的伊朗-美国局势，欧洲股市在新交易周开始时小幅走低。和平谈判。

chinaseconom.title_zh: 中国经济因伊朗战争开始出现裂痕
chinaseconom.summary_zh: 中国的石油和天然气战略储备在一定程度上使其免受影响，但其以制造业为基础的经济开始动摇。

chinawillreq.title_zh: 中国将要求 Meta 解除对人工智能初创公司 Manus 的收购
chinawillreq.summary_zh: 该裁决的影响尚不清楚，但它可能向寻求与外国公司合作的中国科技创始人发出令人不寒而栗的信号。

articles.title: Goldman raises oil price forecasts as Iran war deadlock continues; Shell buying Canada’s ARC in $13.6bn deal – business live
articles.summary: Rolling coverage of the latest economic and financial news China blocks $2bn Meta takeover of AI agent developer Manus Shares in athletic apparel and footwear company Adidas have jumped by almost 1.75% in early trading after three of its athletes shone at the London Marathon yesterday. Sabastian Sawe and Yomif Kejelcha both smashed the two-hour barrier in the men’s marathon race, and Tigst Assefa set a women-only world record in the women’s race. The adidas family is incredibly proud of Sabastian and Tigist’s historic achievements, marking the fastest times humans have ever run in a marathon. This is a testament to the years of hard work and dedication they have made, alongside our innovation team, who have built a supershoe which breaks new ground in the Adizero Adios Pro Evo 3.” Continue reading...
articles.content: Rolling coverage of the latest economic and financial news China blocks $2bn Meta takeover of AI agent developer Manus Shares in athletic apparel and footwear company Adidas have jumped by almost 1.75% in early trading after three of its athletes shone at the London Marathon yesterday. Sabastian Sawe and Yomif Kejelcha both smashed the two-hour barrier in the men’s marathon race, and Tigst Assefa set a women-only world record in the women’s race. The adidas family is incredibly proud of Sabastian and Tigist’s historic achievements, marking the fastest times humans have ever run in a marathon. This is a testament to the years of hard work and dedication they have made, alongside our innovation team, who have built a supershoe which breaks new ground in the Adizero Adios Pro Evo 3.” Continue reading...

articles.title: China blocks $2bn Meta takeover of AI agent developer Manus
articles.summary: Beijing says domestic tech companies must seek explicit government approval for accepting US investment Business live – latest updates China has blocked Meta’s $2bn (£1.5bn) acquisition of an AI startup as it cracks down on US investments in domestic tech companies. Mark Zuckerberg’s Meta , the owner of Facebook, Instagram and WhatsApp, announced the acquisition of Manus, a developer of autonomous AI agents, in December. Continue reading...

active_items.title: WTI 原油单日冲击
active_items.action: 下次报告重点看能源、航运、电力、黄金的传导，不把新能源当第一反应。

active_items.title: 广义成长科技暴露触及上限
active_items.action: 新增资金优先回流宽基、红利低波或黄金，不继续堆成长仓。

active_items.title: 直接 AI 暴露触及上限
active_items.action: 停止新增同类 AI/半导体/港股科技，优先复核重叠和单仓上限。

active_items.title: 黄金仓位低于保险仓下限
active_items.action: 复核是否需要把新增资金的一部分补回黄金保险仓；仍需看价格、溢价和组合整体仓位。

active_items.title: 黄金仓位高于保险仓上限
active_items.action: 提醒不要把黄金当收益主攻；如继续上冲，优先复核是否只保留保险仓功能。

active_items.title: 黄金期货单日大涨
active_items.action: 只做保险仓复核，不追高；看美元指数和美债收益率是否同步支持。

active_items.title: 黄金期货单日大跌
active_items.action: 先确认是否是美元/实际利率驱动；如黄金仓位低于目标区间，再考虑是否分批补保险仓。
